null_zero_policy: if both pass proportions are zero classify ARTEFACT_GEOMETRY_ONLY; if real is positive and null is zero NULL_RATIO is zero

exact_test.name: one_sided_exact_binomial
exact_test.alternative: real pass proportion greater than null

evidence_labels.INDETERMINE: zero real passes or denominator integrity failure

price_null_policy: aggressive-flow and timestamp features remain fixed; all price-dependent impulse and response states are recomputed from each null price world before signals and account episodes
primary_metric: account-level net expectancy after frozen costs
CONTRE: The tripwire has more episodes than prior limited grammars but still only two calendar-year development blocks; a green result cannot authorize promotion without positive walk-forward economics and candidate-specific power.
